messages.body:
$LASE https://www.tradingview.com/news/invezz:1c16f1da1094b:0-lase-stock-nearly-doubles-as-us-navy-shows-more-love/
I’m not gonna sit here and shill the company but some people here are saying the articles are fake and there’s no news and that’s just bs. TODAY The Navy made a $13.2mil follow on order for robotic laser cleaning systems. 

YESTERDAY the Department of War  selected LASE to participate in an EXCLUSIVE 1-on-1 technical exchange with government engineers on their anti drone lasers. 

So nothing is set in stone with that but the information here is ALL factual. Do your own DD.

data.title: LASE stock nearly doubles as US Navy shows more love
data.description: Laser Photonics (LASE) shares ripped higher this morning (Jun. 3) on a major $13.2 million follow-on order from the US Navy.The upward momentum drove LASE's relative strength index (RSI) into the early 90s - indicating extremely "overbought" conditions that often attract profit-takers.At its intrad...

messages.body: $LASE if you are down and out today chill, tomorrow is T3 or CNS settlement on Mondays or T1 share creation and there is truly a ton of it. As much as I've seen in a while. QTEX comes mind only we have more. Check out T3 on ANY, or QTEX. There again, IF there is not a shelf. They will have to do forced buyins on about a 100 or more million worth of synthetics. Then Friday will be T3 or CNS settlement from todays synthetics.
